name: RPlog_Buskers
title: Buskers
summary: In the decaying Yan Square on Dreven, the Caspian operative Veruca Violet moves under the cover of a Biscuit Baron executive scouting real estate, accompanied by the general Janus and the albino agent Vanilla. Amid a lively crowd of street performers, a veiled dancer who is secretly one of their own field agents draws the trio into a flirtatious, pickpocketing routine designed to mask a covert exchange. Veruca and Janus peel away, leaving Vanilla to be led off as the dancer's supposed client, and the two slip into a back alley to confer. There the agent delivers her intelligence: the beggar Auntie Maya recognized the Falleen Ssanyu by name and raved about a returning 'Dark One' angry with all his children and a 'man in red,' before leading Ssanyu away, after which Maya vanished and is presumed dead. To preserve their cover, Vanilla punches the agent and hands over a credit chit and an earring to fake a robbery, then follows the agent's escape instructions out of the square as the agent stages a loud scene about being mugged.
